meta.title: Mirko Andò | Backend, Security & Automation Portfolio
meta.description: Mirko Andò portfolio: backend, automation and cybersecurity projects with a disciplined, stability-focused approach.

hero.title: Mirko Andò
hero.subtitle: I am a Software Engineer.
hero.description: Computer science student at Marconi - Mangano CT focused on building robust backend systems, automation and data processing with a defensive security mindset.

about.title: About me
about.description: A lucid and disciplined mind, in constant tension between inner order and external challenge. I do not seek approval; I aim for coherence between who I am, what I do, and what I plan to become. My approach to work and study: I use a structured but not rigid discipline. Every day I train myself to stay in control without turning off spontaneity, building stable habits even in unstable moments. If I stumble, I quickly realign and turn every obstacle into a growth opportunity.
about.medicalNote: Medical-legal note: Type 1 diabetes mellitus (under insulin treatment) Possession of Italian Law 68/99 - Rules for the right to work of disabled people

education.title: Diploma in Computer Science and Telecommunications
education.intro: I attend the Marconi-Mangano Technical Industrial Institute in Catania, Computer Science and Telecommunications track, Computer Science specialization. This path is training me with an advanced technical approach, where theory, lab work and continuous practice work together in a way that is very close to professional IT contexts.
education.trainingDescription: During the diploma I consolidated skills in software development, systems and digital infrastructure.
trainingItems: Programming: Python, Java, C/C++ and web development
Design and management of relational databases
Networks, protocols, security and device configuration
Software lifecycle: analysis, development and testing
education.scholarshipDescription: Throughout all years of the upper-secondary cycle I received the merit scholarship, a recognition awarded to students with consistent results and responsible behavior.
scholarshipItems: Commitment to classroom activities and extra projects
outcomesTags: Network, server and Linux environment management
education.outcomesDescription: This qualification is in demand in the job market because it combines solid theoretical foundations with strong practical execution.

experience.title: Operating mindset

softSkills.title: Leadership
softSkills.description: I lead by example, taking full responsibility for my actions and decisions.

softSkills.title: Emotional regulation and self-control
softSkills.description: I keep clarity under pressure, distinguishing impulsive reactions from conscious responses.

softSkills.title: Analytical thinking and clear decision-making
softSkills.description: I break down complex problems and act methodically, even in high-intensity operational contexts.

softSkills.title: Discipline and inner consistency
softSkills.description: I rely on consistency and coherence over the long term, regardless of external motivation.

softSkills.title: Effective and adaptive communication
softSkills.description: I tune language, tone and presence to the technical, relational and professional context.

softSkills.title: Operational autonomy and workload management
softSkills.description: I organize tasks and priorities independently, optimizing energy and time to maximize results.

experience.roadmapLead: A summary of the main training milestones and experiences that strengthened my technical profile.

timeline.title: 500+ hours of PCTO and technical certifications
timeline.description: A continuous path through labs, hands-on projects and certifications in software development, networking and cybersecurity.

timeline.title: ITI Diploma in Computer Science and Telecommunications
timeline.description: Marconi-Mangano, Catania: hands-on technical training in backend, databases, operating systems and networks.

timeline.title: School orientation and technical public speaking
timeline.description: Supporting students and families during orientation activities, translating technical topics into clear and effective language.

timeline.title: Informatics Olympiad
timeline.description: Training on logic and algorithmic problem solving in competitive contexts, with a focus on precision and time management.

timeline.title: Cisco Networking Academy - Python Essentials 2
timeline.description: Intermediate Python programming: OOP, modules, exceptions and file handling applied to automation tasks. Issued on 15 October 2024.

timeline.title: Cisco Networking Academy - Network Support and Security
timeline.description: Operational skills in network and endpoint support, troubleshooting and basic security in help-desk scenarios. Issued on 21 October 2024.

timeline.title: Cisco Networking Academy - Data Analytics Essentials
timeline.description: Data analytics fundamentals: collection, cleaning, transformation and analysis with operational tools. Issued on 7 December 2024.

timeline.title: Cisco Networking Academy - Network Defense
timeline.description: Network monitoring and protection with a focus on access control, firewalls, cloud security and alert response. Issued on 12 December 2024.

timeline.title: Cisco Networking Academy - Cyber Threat Management
timeline.description: Cyber threat handling, vulnerability assessment and setting up risk management and incident response plans.

timeline.title: Current professional focus
timeline.description: Developing solid backend projects, maintainable code and strengthening technical English toward C1 level.

timeline.title: Certification portfolio in progress
timeline.description: Python Essentials 1 and 2, Network Support and Security, Data Analytics Essentials, Network Defense, Cyber Threat Management and Networking Basics.

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.intro: A concise view of the operational skills I use in projects, divided by languages and work environments.

items.title: English Quiz - Interactive Web
items.description: An interactive English quiz platform based on the history of the Marconi-Mangano School and previous educational presentations. Designed to improve language skills requested in the Erasmus 2025/2026 awareness project.

items.title: Marconi-Cortex
items.description: A modular school management system designed to support every operational area of a training institute. It was born from the daily observation of real problems: fragmented tools, manual flows, scattered data and poor visibility.
